description: Voluntary withdrawal attestation. Member-signed, 7-day cooling period before SBT revoke + member-record archive. Distinct from excommunication (no Council vote; no cure period; no charter-violation finding). Member may rescind during cooling window. Privacy: post-archival the member-record is moved to encrypted cold storage per ADR-2605181100; on-chain footprint reduced to DID + withdrawalTimestamp.

memberRecordArchiveCid.description: Encrypted cold-storage archive CID per ADR-2605181100 envelope.

withdrawalReasonOtherText.description: When withdrawalReason=other, optional free-form text. Passes through PII filter.

coolingPeriodEndsAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC end of the 7-day cooling period. MUST be ≥ memberSignedAt + 7 days.

memberSignedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of member's signed withdrawal.

sbtRevokeTxCid.description: On-chain Adherent SBT revoke transaction CID.

memberSignature.description: Member's DID-bound signature over the withdrawal record.

rescindSignature.description: Member's signature over the rescind action.

finalizedAt.description: Finalization timestamp. MUST be ≥ coolingPeriodEndsAt. Triggers SBT revoke + archive.

withdrawalReason.description: Optional, member-self-declared. Default = no-reason-stated. Other = freeform but PII filter applies.

rescindedAt.description: If present, member rescinded during cooling period. No further action; record marked rescinded.

attestingDid.description: DID of the chigiri cell emitting the attestation (typically chigiri_member_offboarding cell DID).
